Help and diagnostics

Support

Paper Flock production release · Build v0.16

Loading the configured beta support channel…

Report a problem

  1. Return to the game.
  2. Choose Send feedback at the bottom.
  3. Download the generated JSON report.
  4. Send that file through the configured support channel.

Useful diagnostic files

Under Prototype testing tools, you may export diagnostics and a backup. Diagnostics contain build, browser, service-worker, storage-size, and local error details. Backups contain local Paper Flock data and should be treated as private.

Before reporting progress loss

Do not reset site data. Export diagnostics and a backup first. Include whether the game was installed, online or offline, and whether an update had just been applied.
